name: I'm in the hereafter.
hints: The hereafter - you're dead. This is the death/game-over room.
There are no exits. You must restore a saved game.
This is the death state. You ended up here from a fatal action (car explosion, washing the hose, etc.). SAVE frequently and restore from your last save.
notes: Death/game-over room (the hereafter). No exits - must restore a saved game. Reached by fatal actions like the jet car exploding, washing the fuel hose in the lake, etc.
